The '''Rifle Worlds''' was a medium-sized quadrant located near the middle of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. In total, the quadrant contained ten inhabited [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] and at least one native [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Mairan/Legends|Mairans]].<ref name="TEA" /> The quadrant was also intersected by four different [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace lanes]].

The Rifle Worlds, which were named for an attempt by the region to secede from [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]], were settled primarily during the "industrial period" of Hapes and became the primary manufacturing center of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], which the Worlds' locals resented deeply.<ref name="CTD:10">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref>
